_comment: Captured SDK bwrap SETUP argv for the faithful sandbox canary (#5875 / ADR-079). This file is POPULATED by PR3's creds-gated CI capture (sandbox-canary.mjs --capture), which drives the real @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk query() with buildAgentSandboxConfig() and snapshots the argv. It MUST NOT be hand-authored (a hand-rolled argv is the #4932 false-rollback trap). Until the first real capture lands, the deploy-time replay records verdict=canary_infra_error reason=fixture_uncaptured (non-blocking dark-launch — no green soak verdicts accrue until a real argv is captured).
